features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.description: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 hit points, gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier + your warlock level.

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.description: When you make an ability check or saving throw, add a d10 to the roll (after the roll, before effects). Once per short or long rest.

features.name: Fiendish Resilience
features.description: Choose one damage type at the end of a short or long rest: you have resistance to it until you choose another (nonmagical and non-silvered weapons only).

features.name: Hurl Through Hell
features.description: When you hit a creature with an attack, send it hurtling through the lower planes: it disappears until the end of your next turn and takes 10d10 psychic damage on return (fiends excepted). Once per long rest.

featureChoices.name: Pact Boon
featureChoices.description: Your patron bestows a gift upon you for your loyal service.

options.name: Pact of the Chain
options.description: Learn find familiar; your familiar can take special forms (imp, pseudodragon, quasit, or sprite).

options.name: Pact of the Blade
options.description: Create a pact weapon as an action; you are proficient with it and can change its form.

options.name: Pact of the Tome
options.description: Your patron gives you a Book of Shadows with three cantrips from any class's spell list.

featureChoices.name: Eldritch Invocations
featureChoices.description: You learn two eldritch invocations of your choice; some have prerequisites you must meet.

options.name: Agonizing Blast
options.description: When you cast eldritch blast, add your Charisma modifier to the damage it deals on a hit.

options.name: Armor of Shadows
options.description: You can cast mage armor on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Ascendant Step
options.description: You can cast levitate on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Beast Speech
options.description: You can cast speak with animals at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Beguiling Influence
options.description: You gain proficiency in the Deception and Persuasion skills.

options.name: Bewitching Whispers
options.description: You can cast compulsion once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Book of Ancient Secrets
options.description: You can now inscribe magical rituals in your Book of Shadows. Choose two 1st-level spells that have the ritual tag from any class's spell list. The spells needn't be from the same spell list. The spells appear in the book and don't count against the number of spells you know. With your Book of Shadows in hand, you can cast the chosen spells as rituals. You can't cast the spells except as rituals, unless you've learned them by some other means. You can also cast a warlock spell you know as a ritual if it has the ritual tag. On your adventures, you can add other ritual spells to your Book of Shadows. When you find such a spell, you can add it to the book if the spell's level is equal to or less than half your warlock level (rounded up) and if you can spare the time to transcribe the spell. For each level of the spell, the transcription process takes 2 hours and costs 50 gp for the rare inks needed to inscribe it.

options.name: Chains of Carceri
options.description: You can cast hold monster at will—targeting a celestial, fiend, or elemental—without expending a spell slot or material components. You must finish a long rest before you can use this invocation on the same creature again.
options.prereq: 15th-level warlock, Pact of the Chain feature

options.name: Devil's Sight
options.description: You can see normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 feet.

options.name: Dreadful Word
options.description: You can cast confusion once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Eldritch Sight
options.description: You can cast detect magic at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Eldritch Spear
options.description: When you cast eldritch blast, its range is 300 feet.

options.name: Eyes of the Rune Keeper
options.description: You can read all writing.

options.name: Fiendish Vigor
options.description: You can cast false life on yourself at will as a 1st-level spell, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Gaze of Two Minds
options.description: You can use your action to touch a willing humanoid and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn. As long as the creature is on the same plane of existence as you, you can use your action on subsequent turns to maintain this connection, extending the duration until the end of your next turn. While perceiving through the other creature's senses, you benefit from any special senses possessed by that creature, and you are blinded and deafened to your own surroundings.

options.name: Lifedrinker
options.description: When you hit a creature with your pact weapon, the creature takes extra necrotic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of 1).
options.prereq: 12th-level warlock, Pact of the Blade feature

options.name: Mask of Many Faces
options.description: You can cast disguise self at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Master of Myriad Forms
options.description: You can cast alter self at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Minions of Chaos
options.description: You can cast conjure elemental once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Mire the Mind
options.description: You can cast slow once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Misty Visions
options.description: You can cast silent image at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: One with Shadows
options.description: When you are in an area of dim light or darkness, you can use your action to become invisible until you move or take an action or a reaction.

options.name: Otherworldly Leap
options.description: You can cast jump on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Repelling Blast
options.description: When you hit a creature with eldritch blast, you can push the creature up to 10 feet away from you in a straight line.

options.name: Sculptor of Flesh
options.description: You can cast polymorph once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Sign of Ill Omen
options.description: You can cast bestow curse once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Thief of Five Fates
options.description: You can cast bane once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Thirsting Blade
options.description: You can attack with your pact weapon twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
options.prereq: 5th-level warlock, Pact of the Blade feature

options.name: Visions of Distant Realms
options.description: You can cast arcane eye at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Voice of the Chain Master
options.description: You can communicate telepathically with your familiar and perceive through your familiar's senses as long as you are on the same plane of existence. Additionally, while perceiving through your familiar's senses, you can also speak through your familiar in your own voice, even if your familiar is normally incapable of speech.

options.name: Whispers of the Grave
options.description: You can cast speak with dead at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Witch Sight
options.description: You can see the true form of any shapechanger or creature concealed by illusion or transmutation magic while the creature is within 30 feet of you and within line of sight.

options.name: Agonizing Blast
options.description: When you cast eldritch blast, add your Charisma modifier to the damage it deals on a hit.

options.name: Armor of Shadows
options.description: You can cast mage armor on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Ascendant Step
options.description: You can cast levitate on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Beast Speech
options.description: You can cast speak with animals at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Beguiling Influence
options.description: You gain proficiency in the Deception and Persuasion skills.

options.name: Bewitching Whispers
options.description: You can cast compulsion once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

With your Book of Shadows in hand, you can cast the chosen spells as rituals. You can't cast the spells except as rituals, unless you've learned them by some other means. options.description: When you hit a creature with eldritch blast, you can push the creature up to 10 feet away from you in a straight line.

options.name: Sculptor of Flesh
options.description: You can cast polymorph once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Sign of Ill Omen
options.description: You can cast bestow curse once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Thief of Five Fates
options.description: You can cast bane once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Thirsting Blade
options.description: You can attack with your pact weapon twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
options.prereq: 5th-level warlock, Pact of the Blade feature

options.name: Visions of Distant Realms
options.description: You can cast arcane eye at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Voice of the Chain Master
options.description: You can communicate telepathically with your familiar and perceive through your familiar's senses as long as you are on the same plane of existence. Additionally, while perceiving through your familiar's senses, you can also speak through your familiar in your own voice, even if your familiar is normally incapable of speech.

options.name: Whispers of the Grave
options.description: You can cast speak with dead at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Witch Sight
options.description: You can see the true form of any shapechanger or creature concealed by illusion or transmutation magic while the creature is within 30 feet of you and within line of sight.

options.name: Agonizing Blast
options.description: When you cast eldritch blast, add your Charisma modifier to the damage it deals on a hit.

options.name: Armor of Shadows
options.description: You can cast mage armor on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Ascendant Step
options.description: You can cast levitate on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Beast Speech
options.description: You can cast speak with animals at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Beguiling Influence
options.description: You gain proficiency in the Deception and Persuasion skills.

options.name: Bewitching Whispers
options.description: You can cast compulsion once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Book of Ancient Secrets
options.description: You can now inscribe magical rituals in your Book of Shadows. Choose two 1st-level spells that have the ritual tag from any class's spell list. The spells needn't be from the same spell list. The spells appear in the book and don't count against the number of spells you know. With your Book of Shadows in hand, you can cast the chosen spells as rituals. You can't cast the spells except as rituals, unless you've learned them by some other means. You can also cast a warlock spell you know as a ritual if it has the ritual tag. On your adventures, you can add other ritual spells to your Book of Shadows. When you find such a spell, you can add it to the book if the spell's level is equal to or less than half your warlock level (rounded up) and if you can spare the time to transcribe the spell. For each level of the spell, the transcription process takes 2 hours and costs 50 gp for the rare inks needed to inscribe it.

options.name: Chains of Carceri
options.description: You can cast hold monster at will—targeting a celestial, fiend, or elemental—without expending a spell slot or material components. You must finish a long rest before you can use this invocation on the same creature again.
options.prereq: 15th-level warlock, Pact of the Chain feature

options.name: Devil's Sight
options.description: You can see normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 feet.

options.name: Dreadful Word
options.description: You can cast confusion once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Eldritch Sight
options.description: You can cast detect magic at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Eldritch Spear
options.description: When you cast eldritch blast, its range is 300 feet.

options.name: Eyes of the Rune Keeper
options.description: You can read all writing.

options.name: Fiendish Vigor
options.description: You can cast false life on yourself at will as a 1st-level spell, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Gaze of Two Minds
options.description: You can use your action to touch a willing humanoid and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn. As long as the creature is on the same plane of existence as you, you can use your action on subsequent turns to maintain this connection, extending the duration until the end of your next turn. While perceiving through the other creature's senses, you benefit from any special senses possessed by that creature, and you are blinded and deafened to your own surroundings.

options.name: Lifedrinker
options.description: When you hit a creature with your pact weapon, the creature takes extra necrotic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of 1).
options.prereq: 12th-level warlock, Pact of the Blade feature

options.name: Mask of Many Faces
options.description: You can cast disguise self at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Master of Myriad Forms
options.description: You can cast alter self at will, without expending a spell slot.

options.name: Minions of Chaos
options.description: You can cast conjure elemental once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Mire the Mind
options.description: You can cast slow once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.name: Misty Visions
options.description: You can cast silent image at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: One with Shadows
options.description: When you are in an area of dim light or darkness, you can use your action to become invisible until you move or take an action or a reaction.

options.name: Otherworldly Leap
options.description: You can cast jump on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

options.name: Repelling Blast
options.description: When you hit a creature with eldritch blast, you can push the creature up to 10 feet away from you in a straight line.

options.description: You can cast polymorph once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.description: You can cast bane once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

options.description: You can attack with your pact weapon twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron
features.description: Your patron (chosen at 1st level) grants features at 1st, 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: You cast warlock spells using Charisma. Your few spell slots are all the same level and are all regained on a short or long rest.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You learn two eldritch invocations, fragments of forbidden knowledge granting abiding magical abilities; you learn more as you gain warlock levels and can swap one when you level.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
features.description: Choose one 6th-level warlock spell as an arcanum: cast it once without a spell slot, regained on a long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)
features.description: Choose one 7th-level warlock spell as an arcanum: cast it once without a spell slot, regained on a long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
features.description: Choose one 8th-level warlock spell as an arcanum: cast it once without a spell slot, regained on a long rest.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)
features.description: Choose one 9th-level warlock spell as an arcanum: cast it once without a spell slot, regained on a long rest.

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: Spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots. Once used, you must finish a long rest before using it again.
